content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 11, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on Jun 11 focused on maturing the agent orchestrator, expanding the third-party plugin registry, and stabilizing cloud infrastructure. Key achievements include enabling autonomous sub-agent economic loops, improving cross-platform environment handling, and resolving critical deployment bugs in the control-plane and cloud-frontend.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Agent Orchestration & Autonomy**
*   Enabled autonomous monetized-app loops by wiring the child-to-parent `USE_SKILL` broker dispatcher ([#8275](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8275)).
*   Fixed session timeout handling for ACP initialize handshakes ([#8286](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8286)).
*   Improved cross-platform compatibility by enabling Windows environment variable forwarding for ACP sub-agents ([#8285](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8285)).

**Cloud Infrastructure & API Stability**
*   Automated data-plane private network management via Terraform ([#8392](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8392)) and decoupled control-plane DNS from VM creation ([#8388](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8388)).
*   Resolved infrastructure deployment bugs related to GHA quote-escaping and `xargs` whitespace stripping ([#8391](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8391), [#8390](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8390)).
*   Enabled affiliate revenue-share tracking for embeddings and voice inference routes ([#8264](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8264)).

**Plugin Registry & Ecosystem**
*   Registered `elizaos-plugin-neynar-search` ([#8346](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8346)), `elizaos-plugin-coinrailz` ([#8382](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8382)), and `@usenami/plugin-signer` ([#8294](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8294)) to the third-party registry.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**CLI & Installation Stability**
*   Resolved global installation crashes for `elizaos` and `@elizaos/cli` by fixing bin shim paths and removing incompatible dependencies ([#8000](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8000), [#8001](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8001)).

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES

**Android Build & Plugin Synchronization ([#8387](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8387))**
*   Debugging continues regarding the "clean-tree" build process which currently produces web-less APKs.
*   Recent findings highlight that Capacitor plugin registration is "all-or-nothing"; a single missing class causes the entire plugin set to be discarded.
*   The asset server's catch-all 200 status is masking relative-URL bugs, leading to silent failures in dynamic view switching and API calls. Fixes are being tested to resolve rooted paths against the configured `apiBase`.
